title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 550.310 - Judge or other officer violating law, how punished
text:
550.310.  Judge or other officer violating law, how punished. — Every judge, prosecuting attorney, clerk or judge who shall knowingly violate any provision of this chapter shall be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor and, upon conviction, shall be fined not exceeding one thousand dollars.
(L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Effective 1-02-79
